GROUP:      example.com
KIND:       ListResource
VERSION:    v1

DESCRIPTION:
    ListResource for testing list with children at depth.

FIELDS:
  metadata	<ObjectMeta>
    name	<string>
  items	<[]Item>
    id	<integer>
    name	<string>
    config	<Object>
      enabled	<boolean>
      value	<string>
  status	<Status>
    ready	<boolean>
